steps.title: Substitute x equals 2 into the function
steps.content:
To find $f(2)$, replace $x$ with \$2$ in the function definition:
$$f(2) = 8(2)^3 + 4$$

steps.title: Evaluate using order of operations
steps.content:
Work through the arithmetic:
  • Exponent: $2^3 = 8$
  • Multiplication: $8 \cdot 8 = 64$
  • Addition: $64 + 4 = 68$
The value of $f(2)$ is \$68$.
